```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
pdf_url  <- rmarkdown::metadata$pdf
data_url <- rmarkdown::metadata$data
code_url <- rmarkdown::metadata$code

parts <- c('<div class="download-buttons">')

if (!is.null(pdf_url) && nzchar(pdf_url)) {
  parts <- c(parts, sprintf(
    '<a class="download-btn download-btn-pdf" href="%s" download><span class="download-btn-icon"><i class="bi bi-download"></i></span><span class="download-btn-label">Download PDF</span></a>',
    pdf_url
  ))
}

if (!is.null(data_url) && nzchar(data_url)) {
  parts <- c(parts, sprintf(
    '<a class="download-btn download-btn-data" href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="download-btn-icon"><i class="bi bi-database"></i></span><span class="download-btn-label">Data</span></a>',
    data_url
  ))
}

if (!is.null(code_url) && nzchar(code_url)) {
  parts <- c(parts, sprintf(
    '<a class="download-btn download-btn-code" href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="download-btn-icon"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i></span><span class="download-btn-label">Code</span></a>',
    code_url
  ))
}

parts <- c(parts, '</div>')

cat(paste(parts, collapse = ""))
```
